description: Agentic market signal — real-time BUY / SELL / HOLD for any trading pair, driven by live technical indicators and autonomous AI reasoning.
detailedDescription: An autonomous agentic system that ingests live market indicators — RSI, MACD, and Bollinger Bands — across any exchange and timeframe. A multi-step reasoning pipeline synthesises the signals and returns a structured trading decision (BUY / SELL / HOLD) with a confidence score and plain-English rationale, fully verified and settled on-chain.

inputs.name: symbol
inputs.description: Trading pair in TAAPI format, e.g. 'BTC/USDT'. Defaults to 'BTC/USDT' if omitted.

inputs.name: exchange
inputs.description: Exchange identifier recognised by TAAPI (e.g. 'binance'). Defaults to 'binance'.

outputs.name: indicators
outputs.description: Raw indicator values: rsi, macd, macdSignal, macdHist, bbUpper, bbMiddle, bbLower, price.

outputs.name: symbol
outputs.description: The trading pair that was analysed.

outputs.name: interval
outputs.description: The candle interval that was used.

outputs.name: timestamp
outputs.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the analysis was run.
